description: A new family medicine physician, Dr. Sarah Chen, is joining the practice. Create her provider user account in LibreHealth EHR using the administrator credentials (Username: admin, Password: password). Configure the account with the following details: Username 'schen', Password 'Clinic2024!', First Name 'Sarah', Last Name 'Chen', Middle Name 'L', Federal Tax ID '45-2837196', NPI '1538246790', and Specialty 'Family Practice'. The account must be authorized as a provider, assigned to the 'Physicians' Access Control Group, and have a default facility selected.
